title: HOSA Forensic Science: Forensic Anthropology
description:
### Forensic Anthropology

Focuses on the identification of human skeletal remains and determining the biological profile.

**Key Topics:**
*   **Osteology:** Bone anatomy and identification.
*   **Biological Profile:** Estimating age, sex, stature, and ancestry from bones.
*   **Trauma Analysis:** Distinguishing between ante-mortem, peri-mortem, and post-mortem trauma.
*   **Recovery Methods:** Forensic archaeology techniques.
seo_title: HOSA Forensic Science: Forensic Anthropology Practice Test
seo_description: Master forensic anthropology for the HOSA competition. Practice identifying skeletal remains, estimating age and sex, and analyzing bone trauma.

title: HOSA Forensic Science: Crime Scene & Death Investigation
description:
### Crime Scene & Death Investigation

Comprehensive review of crime scene processing and the medical-legal investigation of death.

**Key Topics:**
*   **Crime Scene Management:** Documentation, evidence collection, and chain of custody.
*   **Death Investigation:** Post-mortem changes (rigor, algor, livor mortis).
*   **Manner of Death:** Homicide, suicide, accidental, natural, and undetermined.
*   **Evidence Types:** Biological, trace, and digital evidence.
seo_title: HOSA Forensic Science: Crime Scene Investigation Practice Test
seo_description: Prepare for HOSA Forensic Science with our crime scene and death investigation mock test. Covers post-mortem changes and evidence collection.

title: HOSA Forensic Science: Forensic Entomology
description:
### Forensic Entomology

Explores the use of insects and other arthropods in legal investigations, primarily for estimating the time since death.

**Key Topics:**
*   **Insect Colonization:** Primary and secondary colonizers (blowflies, beetles).
*   **Developmental Stages:** Life cycles and calculating Accumulated Degree Hours (ADH).
*   **Succession:** The predictable sequence of insect arrival during decomposition.
*   **Variables:** Impact of drugs, weather, and burial on insect growth.
seo_title: HOSA Forensic Science: Forensic Entomology Mock Test
seo_description: Test your knowledge of forensic entomology for HOSA. Practice insect life cycles, ADH calculations, and decomposition stages.

title: HOSA Forensic Science: Forensic History & Careers
description:
### Forensic History & Careers

Overview of the evolution of forensic science and the various professional roles within the field.

**Key Topics:**
*   **Historical Milestones:** Pioneers like Orfila, Bertillon, Galton, and Locard.
*   **Legal Precedents:** Frye and Daubert standards for evidence admissibility.
*   **Forensic Careers:** Roles of pathologists, toxicologists, odontologists, and more.
*   **Laboratory Organization:** Structure and functions of modern crime labs.
seo_title: HOSA Forensic Science: History and Careers Practice Quiz
seo_description: Learn about the pioneers of forensic science and various career paths. Free HOSA practice quiz on historical milestones and legal standards.

title: HOSA Forensic Science: Forensic Toxicology & Pharmacology
description:
### Forensic Toxicology & Pharmacology

Deep dive into the detection and effects of drugs, poisons, and alcohol on the human body.

**Key Topics:**
*   **Drug Classifications:** Schedules, stimulants, depressants, and narcotics.
*   **Alcohol Metabolism:** Absorption, distribution, and elimination (Widmark formula).
*   **Poisons & Toxins:** Heavy metals (Lead, Arsenic) and biological agents (Ricin, Anthrax).
*   **Laboratory Methods:** Presumptive vs. confirmatory testing (GC-MS).
seo_title: HOSA Forensic Science: Toxicology Practice Test
seo_description: Prepare for the HOSA Toxicology section. Practice drug classifications, alcohol metabolism, and poison detection online.

title: HOSA Forensic Science: Serology and Biological Fluids
description:
### Identification of Biological Fluids (Serology)

Focuses on the detection and analysis of blood, semen, and other biological materials.

**Key Topics:**
*   **Presumptive Testing:** Kastle-Meyer, Luminol, and Hemastix.
*   **Confirmatory Testing:** Hematrace and microcrystalline tests (Teichmann/Takayama).
*   **Bloodstain Pattern Analysis:** Velocity types, directionality, and area of origin.
*   **Blood Typing:** ABO and Rh blood group systems.
seo_title: HOSA Forensic Science: Serology/Bloodstain Practice Test
seo_description: Master forensic serology for HOSA. Practice blood typing, presumptive testing, and bloodstain pattern analysis.

title: HOSA Forensic Science: Techniques of DNA Analysis
description:
### Techniques of DNA Analysis

Advanced review of modern DNA profiling and its application in forensic science.

**Key Topics:**
*   **DNA Structure:** Nucleotides, base-pairing, and nuclear vs. mitochondrial DNA.
*   **PCR Amplification:** Denaturation, annealing, and extension steps.
*   **STB Analysis:** Analyzing short tandem repeats and gel electrophoresis.
*   **Databases:** CODIS, NDIS tiers, and random match probability calculations.
seo_title: HOSA Forensic Science: DNA Analysis Practice Quiz
seo_description: Prepare for the HOSA DNA analysis section. Practice PCR steps, STR analysis, and CODIS database concepts online.

title: HOSA Forensic Science: Forensic Psychology & Psychiatry
description:
### Forensic Psychology & Psychiatry

Analysis of human behavior and mental health in the context of the legal system.

**Key Topics:**
*   **Legal Competence:** Competency to stand trial and the insanity defense standards (M'Naghten).
*   **Disorders & Behavior:** Psychopathy (PCL-R), antisocial personality disorder, and serial offenders.
*   **Profiling:** Organized vs. disorganized offenders, MO vs. Signature.
*   **Deception:** Polygraphy, malingering, and interview techniques.
seo_title: HOSA Forensic Science: Psychology & Psychiatry Practice Test
seo_description: Practice HOSA Forensic Psychology. Test your knowledge of competency standards, profiling, and psychopathy online.
